run_interactive_REPL: run the interactive coding assistant REPL with a local AI model in any project directory
resume_session_last: resume the last interactive coding session with the -r last flag to continue previous work
switch_model_runtime: switch to a different AI model at runtime using the /switch slash command in the REPL
compact_conversation_history: compact the conversation history to reduce context length using the /compact slash command
browse_url_interactive: browse a URL interactively with Playwright using the /browse -i slash command in the REPL
